metadata.description: Audienti plugins for go-to-market and engineering workflows.

plugins.name: plan-loop-executor
plugins.description: Execute written implementation plans through a controller-owned, test-first task loop.

plugins.name: signal-prospect-research
plugins.description: Turn an outbound idea into ranked target companies and likely buyers.

plugins.name: reddit-pain-finder
plugins.description: Turn an offer into pain-first Reddit queries, ranked live threads, and thread-specific reply drafts.

plugins.name: sales-sheet-builder
plugins.description: Build compressed, differentiated B2B sales sheets with separate internal research workbooks.
